tasks.title: WaylayCore package skeleton + locked domain value types
acceptance_criteria: swift build succeeds standalone with zero SwiftUI/CoreLocation/StoreKit/UIKit imports in this folder
every type's signature matches tech_specs verbatim including Sendable/Codable conformances

tasks.title: Core Data model + App Group PersistenceController
acceptance_criteria: NSPersistentContainer loads from the App Group container identifier, not the default location
NSPersistentHistoryTrackingKey and NSPersistentStoreRemoteChangeNotificationPostOptionKey both true
unit test round-trips a Place entity insert+fetch

tasks.title: PlaceRepository (Core Data-backed) with inline MonitoringDecisionRecord pruning
acceptance_criteria: saveCapture commits synchronously/durably before returning CaptureResult
appendMonitoringDecision prunes past 20-records-or-30-days per place in the same write transaction
unit tests cover the prune boundary and confirm no data loss for the retained window

tasks.title: PlaceStateResolver pure function + fixture unit tests
acceptance_criteria: resolves all 6 locked PlaceDerivedState cases from fixture timestamps
zero I/O, no CoreLocation/UserNotifications import anywhere in the file

tasks.title: Xcode multi-target project skeleton, signing, App Group entitlements
acceptance_criteria: xcodebuild succeeds for all three targets with -allowProvisioningUpdates against a real team ID
app installs and launches on a physical iPhone
App Group container identifier matches exactly across all three entitlements files

tasks.title: Stub extension cross-process Core Data merge proof
acceptance_criteria: a Place written from the main app is observably read by the share-extension stub via NSPersistentStoreRemoteChange on a real device
before/after counts logged to console as the exit artifact

tasks.title: App Store Connect product creation + local .storekit config
acceptance_criteria: monthly and yearly subscription product IDs exist in App Store Connect
product IDs mirrored in the local .storekit config and recorded in docs/storekit-config-notes.md

tasks.title: AppCapabilitySnapshot + LocationProviding protocol and fake
acceptance_criteria: fake provider deterministically simulates region entry/exit/authorization-change in XCTest
no real CoreLocation import outside the future adapter file

tasks.title: Real CLLocationManager-backed LocationProviding adapter
acceptance_criteria: compiles against real CLLocationManager
is the only file besides the protocol that imports CoreLocation directly

tasks.title: MonitoringEngine (pure) + MonitoringReconciler with hard 20-region clamp
acceptance_criteria: unit suite green including the >8-place contention fixture at both free-cap and Pro-cap
requiresManualReactivation path covered
reconciler never emits toStartMonitoring beyond 20 regardless of engine output, proven against an adversarial 50-place fixture

tasks.title: EntitlementService on StoreKit 2 live entitlements
acceptance_criteria: effectiveMonitoringCap correctly reflects free (~8) vs Pro (up to 20) against the local .storekit config in tests
entitlement is recomputed from Transaction.currentEntitlements every read, never cached across a launch

tasks.title: capturePlace use case + NotificationHandling boundary
acceptance_criteria: capturePlace commits synchronously then returns success with a degraded displayState if monitoring/notification setup fails afterward, never a false error
UNNotificationCategory registers snooze/dismiss/mark-visited actions

tasks.title: MonitoringCoordinator: recompute/reconcile orchestration incl. force-quit/reboot detection
acceptance_criteria: authorizationDidChange triggers immediate recompute in a fake-provider unit test, not deferred to next launch
force-quit and reboot produce distinct, testable AppCapabilitySnapshot flags

tasks.title: Design tokens and shared visual primitives
acceptance_criteria: matches the locked design_handoff palette/spacing/radius/type tokens exactly
verified against largest Dynamic Type accessibility size in previews

tasks.title: AppRouter + two-tab navigation shell
acceptance_criteria: exactly Home/Library tabs, each with its own NavigationStack
a deep link mid-navigation appends to libraryPath via onChange, never resets the path (covered by a UI test)

tasks.title: Onboarding screen
acceptance_criteria: single screen, one CTA, no permission ask/cap explanation/premium pitch
serif type used only here and in Home's empty state, nowhere else

tasks.title: Home screen, CaptureButton, ReceiptToast
acceptance_criteria: all 4 locked HomeViewState cases render correctly from fixtures
capture-to-persisted measured under 3 seconds in a UI test against the real repository
receipt toast never auto-dismisses under VoiceOver/Switch Control

tasks.title: Library screen: 5 always-visible sections
acceptance_criteria: all 5 sections always visible, never behind a filter tap
every row pairs icon+text for state, never color alone
VoiceOver announces name then state then reason then action, in that order

tasks.title: Place Detail: 6 state variants + manual-promote/reactivate
acceptance_criteria: only actions valid for the current state are shown
reactivate/manualPromote append a UserActionEvent and clear requiresManualReactivation on the next repository read

tasks.title: Permission upgrade sheet (Always + notifications, earned context)
acceptance_criteria: appears immediately after the first successful save, not before
declined path surfaces honestly downstream in Home/Library, never a silent dead end

tasks.title: DiagnosticsService + Settings/Diagnostics UI
acceptance_criteria: 3-tier summary plus full per-place sub-reason list rendered
occupiesSystemRegionSlot matches CLLocationManager.monitoredRegions on a real device
force-quit vs reboot are visibly distinct after relaunch

tasks.title: RecoveryLink shared component + degraded-state wiring
acceptance_criteria: every degraded/paused surface (Home, Library, Diagnostics) reuses this single component
deep-links correctly to the relevant Settings app page

tasks.title: Paywall UI + PaywallViewState
acceptance_criteria: pitch/purchasing/restored/failed states all render correctly
Restore Purchases always visible above the fold in every state
a real purchase and a real restore succeed against StoreKit sandbox on a fresh install

tasks.title: Widget extension (WidgetRefreshService + timeline provider)
acceptance_criteria: reloads are coalesced/debounced plus one on foreground/background transition, never fired per mutation
widget shows status line + recent-captures strip consistent with Home

tasks.title: Share Extension (real capture facade)
acceptance_criteria: save-then-toast only, no mini-form
calls the identical capturePlace use case Home uses
a share-captured place appears in the main app immediately via cross-process merge

tasks.title: App Intents / Siri shortcuts
acceptance_criteria: a Siri shortcut triggers the same capturePlace path as Home
CaptureSource.siriIntent is recorded correctly on the resulting place

tasks.title: Duplicate/near-duplicate silent auto-merge heuristic
acceptance_criteria: a capture within a small radius of an existing unresolved/active place auto-merges silently
a dismissible after-the-fact note is surfaced, never a mid-capture prompt

tasks.title: Privacy strings + PrivacyInfo.xcprivacy manifest
acceptance_criteria: Always-usage-description string explicitly names the background reminder benefit in plain language
PrivacyInfo.xcprivacy present and valid for submission

tasks.title: VoiceOver/accessibility audit across Home, Library, Place Detail
acceptance_criteria: documented pass confirming the locked name-state-reason-action announcement order
any failures filed as findings for primary_ui to fix in their own files, never edited directly by this lane

tasks.title: Real-device hardening pass: walking/GPX tests, reinstall/restore, capture-latency measurement
acceptance_criteria: recorded device log of real region entry producing exactly one notification per resolution path (snoozed, dismissed, visited), no double-firing
reinstall + restore-purchases verified on a fresh install
on-device capture-commit latency XCTest performance number recorded

tasks.title: Checkpoint A: on-device region registration correctness
acceptance_criteria: documented device log showing the reconciler's desired active set matches CLLocationManager.monitoredRegions under the cap
Diagnostics' occupiesSystemRegionSlot confirmed correct against that same log

tasks.title: Checkpoint B: one-shot notification delivery + resolution semantics
acceptance_criteria: one real region entry produces exactly one notification episode
snooze/dismiss/mark-visited each correctly mutate persisted state across relaunch
no double-fire confirmed across all three resolution paths
